red.scratchpad:
- Mortar must reach x=22 cover; central wall blocks direct path, use world.path to navigate around it.
- mbt should stay near enemy to maximize splash, retreat when HP <30% (set retreat_until) and avoid clustering with infantry to prevent friendly fire.
- Infantry should prioritize killing enemy medics, keep at least 2 cells away from own mbt, and stay near x=22 cover.
- Medic should heal allies with HP <50% and retreat when HP <30%; stay near front line.
- Drones should broadcast nearest enemy each tick, attack when within 2 cells, and retreat when HP <30%; orbit at the edge of their 18‑tile vision.

blue.scratchpad:
- Fixed the min() on empty list bug by checking that target is not None before any min() or sorting.
- Use me.cooldown (the built‑in attribute) for attack cooldown checks.
- Added a simple retreat timer (self.retreat_until) that triggers when HP <30%; this prevents oscillating retreat logic.
- Drones now broadcast enemy positions every tick ("E:x,y") to share vision with artillery units.
- Mortars only fire when line_of_sight is confirmed and enemies are within 8 cells, reducing wasted shots.
- Infantry now moves only when a target is within 2 cells, keeping a safe gap from mbt to avoid friendly‑fire splash.
- All units respect the 2‑cell spacing rule around mbt; world.path is used for obstacle‑aware movement.
- Prioritized killing enemy medics and low‑HP units by sorting visible enemies with (type != medic, hp, id).
- Composition points (76) stay well under the 100‑point limit, giving flexibility for future tweaks.
